programme.title: WSL Championship Tour 2025
programme.sub-title: WSL Lexus Pipe Pro wrap show

programme.title: One at a Time

programme.title: Rolling Away

programme.series-desc: Pushing boundaries and defying expectations – it's all a normal part of Ryan Sheckler's epic skateboarding journey.

programme.title: Red Bull Drop In Tour
programme.desc: See the Red Bull squad put on two insane skate demos in Tokyo and Osaka, then hit the banks, rails and anything else the streets could throw at them on an intense 500km tour of Japan.
programme.series-desc: Catch up with the Red Bull Drop In Japan Tour with Zion Wright, Torey Pudwill, Ryan Decenzo and Jake Wooten.

programme.title: Cycling Around the World
programme.sub-title: Creative BMX through the streets of Croatia
programme.desc: The Croatian town of Rovinj, famous for its 16th century Mediterranean architecture and streets so tight they're not easy to get around even on foot, makes for a tantalisingly tough BMX challenge.
programme.series-desc: Rovinj, famous for its 16th century architecture and narrow streets, makes for an enticing BMX challenge.

programme.title: Kriss Kyle rides his BMX off a helicopter
programme.desc: Despite a fear of heights Kriss Kyle jumps from a helicopter onto the roof of Burj Al Arab Jumeirah hotel in Dubai on his BMX bike. He then roams around as if it's a BMX playground made just for him.
programme.series-desc: Watch Kriss Kyle jump from a helicopter onto the roof of Burj Al Arab in Dubai – on his BMX bike.

programme.title: FIM Hard Enduro World Championship 2024
programme.sub-title: Best of Bolton – 24MX Hixpania Hard Enduro
programme.desc: Follow extreme enduro rider Paul Bolton as he rides alongside the competitors fighting for glory at 24MX Hixpania Hard Enduro. The riders faced steep climbs, rocky sections and technical challenges.
programme.series-desc: Follow extreme enduro rider Paul Bolton as he rides alongside Hard Enduro competitors at the season's finale.

programme.title: FIM Hard Enduro World Championship 2023
programme.sub-title: Daily recap 3 – Billy Bolt wins off-road day two at Xross Hard Enduro Rally

programme.title: Drift Masters European Championship 2021

programme.series-desc: Watch the intense battle that unfolded between Conor Shanahan, Piotr Więcek and Adam Zalewski.

programme.title: Felix Baumgartner's supersonic freefall
programme.desc: What does it *really* feel like to jump from space? In 2012 Felix Baumgartner took a helium balloon into the stratosphere and skydived back to earth in a specially made space suit. Whilst in freefall he broke the speed of sound and entered a spin which threatened the entire Red Bull Stratos mission... Felix reflects on his achievement and shares what it really felt like to jump from the edge of space.

programme.title: The Stream
programme.desc: Today on the Stream: Millions of people are flocking to tourist hotspots, but many local communities say mass tourism is harming them.
programme.series-desc:
The Stream is a daily television programme on Al Jazeera English. It is branded as a “Web community With a Global TV show”. On television and online The Stream taps into the extraordinary potential of social media to disseminate news. The Stream is an aggregator of online sources and discussion, seeking out unheard voices, new perspectives from people on the ground and untold angles related to the most compelling stories of the day.
Previously, the show was hosted by Derrick Ashong and Imran Garda. Lisa Fletcher replaced them as the new presenter. On June 25, 2012, the Stream was relaunched with a new studio and opening graphics. Femi Oke replaced Fletcher when Fletcher was picked to host a version of The Stream on Al Jazeera America.

How will those two mothers end their fierce revenge?

programme.title: This Is Europe
programme.desc: At a Brussels boxing gym founded by Moroccan migrants, young boxers counter stereotypes that their neighbourhood - Molenbeek - is a 'hotbed of radicalisation'.
programme.series-desc: Tired of just scraping by, an ambitious janitor scams and schemes his way to the good life in 1980s Poland amid changing regimes and personal chaos.

programme.title: People and Power
programme.desc: People & Power investigates how Israel has further weaponised water against the people of Gaza during the war and why that constitutes a war crime.
programme.series-desc:
People & Power is a current affairs programme on Al Jazeera English which broadcasts once a week, on Wednesdays, and repeated throughout the week.
Each half-hour programme features one investigative documentaries on an issue related to power from around the world. The programme occasionally has one hour specials.

programme.series-desc: An investigation based on the largest leak of documents in British political history. programme.title: The Stream
programme.desc: The Stream is where Al Jazeera's audience becomes a global community.
programme.series-desc:
The Stream is a daily television programme on Al Jazeera English. It is branded as a “Web community With a Global TV show”. On television and online The Stream taps into the extraordinary potential of social media to disseminate news. The Stream is an aggregator of online sources and discussion, seeking out unheard voices, new perspectives from people on the ground and untold angles related to the most compelling stories of the day.
Previously, the show was hosted by Derrick Ashong and Imran Garda. Lisa Fletcher replaced them as the new presenter. On June 25, 2012, the Stream was relaunched with a new studio and opening graphics. Femi Oke replaced Fletcher when Fletcher was picked to host a version of The Stream on Al Jazeera America.

programme.title: Witness
programme.desc: On the deadliest day of the student-led protests in Bangladesh, a photojournalist captures images from all sides of the frontlines.
programme.series-desc: Yu Kyung is a successful woman who is proficient enough to become an executive director of Chunha Group when she started as a secretary. She recently found out her daughter is alive, so she plans to get her back and take her revenge. Meanwhile, Hye Soo is a strong girl who faces challenges head-on. She has a daughter with Ji Ho, and she would do anything for her. However, she gets tragically betrayed by Ji Ho, the love of her life, over power and money. How will those two mothers end their fierce revenge?

programme.series-desc: A news show hosted by Kiryu Coco in which she summarizes the events of the day before. Coco-Kaichou often pitches products as commercial breaks such as her drug AsaCoco which can be inhaled, injected or consumed as a drink. It is tradition to watch Cocos AsaCoco Live News and afterwards Tsunomaki Watames "Watame no Uta" (early morning karaoke format with viewer rock-paper-scissor).

programme.title: Al Jazeera Investigations
programme.desc: Revealing secrets and uncovering truths, the I-Unit breaks global news with exposures of wrongdoing and abuses of power.
programme.series-desc: An investigation based on the largest leak of documents in British political history. The Labour Files examines thousands of internal documents, emails and social media messages to reveal how senior officials in one of the two parties of government in the UK ran a coup by stealth against the elected leader of the party.

programme.series-desc: Listening Post is Al Jazeera English's weekly media review show. It casts a critical eye over not just what gets reported, but how it's reported - covering the coverage of the news & analyzing global events through the prism of the media.

programme.title: Witness
programme.desc: On the deadliest day of the student-led protests in Bangladesh, a photojournalist captures images from all sides of the frontlines.
programme.series-desc: Yu Kyung is a successful woman who is proficient enough to become an executive director of Chunha Group when she started as a secretary. She recently found out her daughter is alive, so she plans to get her back and take her revenge. Meanwhile, Hye Soo is a strong girl who faces challenges head-on. She has a daughter with Ji Ho, and she would do anything for her. However, she gets tragically betrayed by Ji Ho, the love of her life, over power and money. How will those two mothers end their fierce revenge?

programme.title: The Stream
programme.desc: The Stream is where Al Jazeera's audience becomes a global community.
programme.series-desc:
The Stream is a daily television programme on Al Jazeera English. It is branded as a “Web community With a Global TV show”. On television and online The Stream taps into the extraordinary potential of social media to disseminate news. The Stream is an aggregator of online sources and discussion, seeking out unheard voices, new perspectives from people on the ground and untold angles related to the most compelling stories of the day.
Previously, the show was hosted by Derrick Ashong and Imran Garda. Lisa Fletcher replaced them as the new presenter. On June 25, 2012, the Stream was relaunched with a new studio and opening graphics. Femi Oke replaced Fletcher when Fletcher was picked to host a version of The Stream on Al Jazeera America.

programme.desc: Investigative documentary series examining the use and abuse of power.
programme.series-desc:
People & Power is a current affairs programme on Al Jazeera English which broadcasts once a week, on Wednesdays, and repeated throughout the week.
Each half-hour programme features one investigative documentaries on an issue related to power from around the world. The programme occasionally has one hour specials.

programme.sub-title: The U.S. War on Palestinian Activism
programme.desc: The Knight Institute's Jameel Jaffer explains how the U.S. government is imprisoning and expelling people based on their political viewpoints.
programme.series-desc: The Bottom Line is a business discussion programme broadcast in the UK on BBC Radio 4 and the BBC News Channel, and internationally on the BBC World Service and BBC World News. It is co-production between BBC News and The Open University.

programme.series-desc: Yu Kyung is a successful woman who is proficient enough to become an executive director of Chunha Group when she started as a secretary. She recently found out her daughter is alive, so she plans to get her back and take her revenge. Meanwhile, Hye Soo is a strong girl who faces challenges head-on. She has a daughter with Ji Ho, and she would do anything for her. However, she gets tragically betrayed by Ji Ho, the love of her life, over power and money. How will those two mothers end their fierce revenge?

programme.title: People and Power
programme.desc: Investigative documentary series examining the use and abuse of power.
programme.series-desc:
People & Power is a current affairs programme on Al Jazeera English which broadcasts once a week, on Wednesdays, and repeated throughout the week.
Each half-hour programme features one investigative documentaries on an issue related to power from around the world. The programme occasionally has one hour specials.

programme.title: The Stream
programme.desc: The Stream is where Al Jazeera's audience becomes a global community.
programme.series-desc:
The Stream is a daily television programme on Al Jazeera English. It is branded as a “Web community With a Global TV show”. On television and online The Stream taps into the extraordinary potential of social media to disseminate news. The Stream is an aggregator of online sources and discussion, seeking out unheard voices, new perspectives from people on the ground and untold angles related to the most compelling stories of the day.
Previously, the show was hosted by Derrick Ashong and Imran Garda. Lisa Fletcher replaced them as the new presenter. On June 25, 2012, the Stream was relaunched with a new studio and opening graphics. Femi Oke replaced Fletcher when Fletcher was picked to host a version of The Stream on Al Jazeera America.

programme.title: News Live
programme.desc: Up-to-date news and analysis from around the world.
programme.series-desc: A news show hosted by Kiryu Coco in which she summarizes the events of the day before. programme.series-desc:

programme.title: The Stream
programme.desc: The Stream is where Al Jazeera's audience becomes a global community.
programme.series-desc:
The Stream is a daily television programme on Al Jazeera English. It is branded as a “Web community With a Global TV show”. On television and online The Stream taps into the extraordinary potential of social media to disseminate news. The Stream is an aggregator of online sources and discussion, seeking out unheard voices, new perspectives from people on the ground and untold angles related to the most compelling stories of the day.
Previously, the show was hosted by Derrick Ashong and Imran Garda. Lisa Fletcher replaced them as the new presenter. On June 25, 2012, the Stream was relaunched with a new studio and opening graphics. Femi Oke replaced Fletcher when Fletcher was picked to host a version of The Stream on Al Jazeera America.
